details.test: Task 1: Save 3 budget wedding articles under $10,000 from last 12 months
Task 2: Save 8-hour summer outdoor 4 PM timeline to planning board
Task 3: Create Sage & Gold moodboard and add palettes
Task 4: Save a venue guide for ~150 guests with backup indoor space
Task 5: Save a mixed round and long tables seating layout to planning board
Task 6: Generate 6-month checklist and add first tasks to to-dos
Task 7: Add catering budget article (<= $60/guest) to budget planner
Task 8: Save DIY decor projects under 2 hours and under $100 to project list
